creator: jhix@mindspring.com
text:
This is a simple utility which allows one to unpack the recent Plan9
source release from plan9.bell-labs.com without actually it.

Plan9 seems (to me at least) to be interesting in terms of the potential
software that might be ported to FreeBSD.  It's also a very interesting
OS in its own right.

This port is intended as an interim solution until someone gets 'wrap'
ported to FreeBSD. If it kills your system or runs over your dog I
disclaim any responsibility :-)

How-To-Repeat: install the port :-)
